notes: No in-scope implementation or test refs were found under src/Incursa.Quic or tests/Incursa.Quic.Tests.
Adjacent STREAM-frame code and tests exist, but they belong to later sections (S19P6-S19P8) and were not touched.
The generated inventory classifies RFC9000-19 and RFC9000-20 as no_evidence and RFC9000-21 as partial because of STREAM-frame overlap only.
The repository-wide validator mismatch remains a downstream non-blocker and does not indicate a bad QUIC requirement ID.
